dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5663 : ACPAC Modernization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To modify the termination of the aviation consumer protection advisory committee, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the ACPAC Modernization Act.
Section 411 of the FAA Modernization and Reform Act of 2012 (49 U.S.C. 42301 prec. note) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (3) by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;
in paragraph (4) by striking the period and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: in subsection (i) by striking ticket agents,.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives March 24, 2026.
